textByHash.fdd026c666eafef7b2ff0e0f6e8961b1c87813a3: Hello, young sir. Did you want to work on my farm?
textByHash.193c938dbe139e2a1b3cfb261c2e564251108856: Hello, young lady. Did you want to work on my farm?
textByHash.7e5370c1c25ec08bb2bd910ec7718be192e8e00a: Hello, young one. Did you want to work on my farm?
textByHash.4114fafe3dceaf5b6550544aa0b4879443b389ea: I grow fruit here. Special fruit. It grows very fast, but it needs a lot of tending, otherwise it gets the blight and dies.
textByHash.0cf4d4d02ead7cab9bd3c50a0a1a6a02f73cc2f1: These days I'm getting old and slow. You can see all the dead plants from where I've tried to farm them.
textByHash.7340ca69af14870ffb3a5aa238892e313192dd93: It is most of the time. Something very strange did happen recently though.
textByHash.143ea69180add3a8d4d40dbe410fba8a3939d6b7: Well, you see... Two strange hooded figures recently visited the farm. They had an odd smell to them and kept their faces hidden.
textByHash.eb2c44ea487c65ef4f6e17d026bf8a74e697babf: They said they represented some client from the far east and that they wanted to inspect the farm. They had a good look around but seemed rather disappointed when they left.
textByHash.62feb53f219fe0313ba3c0087ee54e5d82963429: I'm a fruit farmer. But now I'm a bit too old for that. Maybe I should try writing books again, like I did when I was younger.
textByHash.69f7a66ab4b59b053a30dc686741875636a24fd0: Well, I'm afraid you're not really suitable.
textByHash.146ae8f80aef3f5bdfb50bce5f11132db231d5a0: Alright. Take a handful of seeds from the table, and head into the farm. When you've harvested some fruit, deposit it straight into the sacks.
textByHash.752872ea630fe3d933dc197a08cd1730f2e2c9ed: Remember, you have to water the plants at each stage, otherwise they die of the blight. Fertiliser makes them grow faster... or die faster if you don't water them.
textByHash.770d736238d3400bb9d9c55486c87ff53937b0de: You'll gain a little extra experience if you grow enough of the fruit successfully.
textByHash.937f2f8afaf3205c9603528c76de964fb1d11d43: What on earth are you wearing?
textByHash.07446debd20e392576ad2434dfbdc6343c65e2d1: Well this is not that kind of farm! I only let normal people work here, so get lost!
textByHash.51a2402d5e933df3c66b79065733c787cbeeec5f: Oh, yes, I remember writing that a long time ago. I told the publisher it should be in the public domain, so that everyone could share the knowledge.
textByHash.213ef2ec08683f733ea1240a55b7b62034d15f2e: Of course, that was before I got so old and found I couldn't afford to hire workers for my farm. Oh well, I hope it helped someone. It wasn't much use to anyone around here.
textByHash.dbadfc1a4c61fd4e38889cc1ebf74314e5929288: Yes, I was friends with the last king, it was very sad when he died. The accusations aimed at poor little Rose were ridiculous.
textByHash.d601126fe9e9943444b517a4b212759f85275fb9: It was all nonesense, the king died naturally! He was old, he'd been on the throne for at least 40 years.
textByHash.41e0ad5e73ac9f313b24ba12e09137a502df8771: Indeed, he married late and his wife... Unfortunately didn't survive bringing Rose into this world.
textByHash.7b61e35d45d1fe60f57fedd2db842e21562a73b2: No... After the incident she was locked away. Most have forgotten about her now.
textByHash.8bc95a586c2d98a0b5c8e2b8971c866c68a7f0d7: Ah, fertiliser. I use a lot of that, but I get mine from Hosidius. If you want to give yours to them, go to their storehouse near the bank.
textByHash.b19ff4d7296e1ab28b8fc69bf683131831415458: I'll give you 60 of my reward points for that.
textByHash.6e57c50d99a89222436673dc874a51b1c760c2d5: I'll give you 120 of my reward points for that.
textByHash.8876662a2e9cc9790a502fb8375755fe3d304303: I'll give you 100 of my reward points for that.
textByHash.0de21b1c292e120e8dfd469a99e8b475c7be83ec: I'll give you 40 of my reward points for that.
textByHash.2c2ab48c064e3b9ae5e81671dc7e6fb06ff67d61: Take some seeds from the table, otherwise you can't do any farming in there!
textByHash.d07523359b5fa574df7d05196f85958ba8bab668: Hey, young sir, do you know what you're doing in there?
textByHash.18872028ba27e7dbf02747858bf76f78babcd5d1: Hey, young lady, do you know what you're doing in there?
textByHash.b30a94401be70ed8c5324c872c0a48ec6e448989: Hey, young one, do you know what you're doing in there?
textByHash.f0c2eee6795977be34165993c3dfacba19ac817c: Grow those seeds in the patches. When you've harvested some fruit, deposit it straight into the sacks.
textByHash.94cda26fc2e77678e18f8e96e2949a340ae6166c: You'll gain a little extra experience if you grow enough of the fruit successfully. So, are you ready to start?
textByHash.2a0ab31b39fdcba1e918dc4f7d58a9337e680e39: Alright, young sir, I won't. Talk to me if you ever want a reminder.
textByHash.edf62e35a73aa36dd7ba991a667ff47efadd396d: Alright, young lady, I won't. Talk to me if you ever want a reminder.
textByHash.1cef179879fb3190925774cc37d0923ad616460c: Alright, young one, I won't. Talk to me if you ever want a reminder.
